SEARCH

Uses of Package
cpdt.common.dto

Packages that use cpdt.common.dto
Package
Description
cpdt.backend.mqtt
Provides MQTT communication components for the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.services
Implements the business logic of the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.twin
Provides components for maintaining the Digital Twin state.
cpdt.common.utils
Provides utility classes shared across the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.simulator.engine
Provides the core simulation engine responsible for executing the chemical plant simulation.
cpdt.simulator.mqtt
Provides MQTT communication components for publishing simulated telemetry to external systems and vice versa.
  • Classes in cpdt.common.dto used by cpdt.backend.mqtt
    Class
    Description
    DeviceStatusMessage
    Represents a device status update exchanged between system components.
  • Classes in cpdt.common.dto used by cpdt.backend.services
    Class
    Description
    AlertMessage
    Represents an alert generated by the backend and published to interested subscribers.
    TelemetryPacket
    Represents a telemetry reading produced by a simulated device and exchanged between the simulator and backend.
  • Classes in cpdt.common.dto used by cpdt.backend.twin
    Class
    Description
    TelemetryPacket
    Represents a telemetry reading produced by a simulated device and exchanged between the simulator and backend.

    Represents a telemetry reading produced by a simulated device and exchanged between the simulator and backend.
